title: crataegus oxyacantha var. heterophylla
intro: Crataegus oxyacantha var. heterophylla, also known as the hawthorn tree, is a variety of the hawthorn plant (Crataegus oxyacantha) that is characterized by its diverse leaf shapes. Traditionally, the leaves, flowers, and fruits of this plant have been used in herbal medicine to support cardiovascular health, with medicinal properties attributed to their high content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidin complexes, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Crataegus oxyacantha var. heterophylla include reducing blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and enhancing cardiovascular function, which can contribute to a decreased risk of heart disease. Hawthorn is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, with herbal preparations often standardized to contain specific amounts of bioactive compounds to ensure efficacy and safety.
